name: Malefic Red-Eyes Black Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓｉｎ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真紅眼の黒竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レッドアイズ・ブラックドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Red-Eyes Black Dragon" from your Deck. There can only be 1 "Malefic" monster on the field. Other monsters you control cannot declare an attack. If there is no face-up Field Spell on the field, destroy this card.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Red-Eyes Black Dragon" from your Deck. There can only be 1 "Malefic" monster on the field. Other monsters you control cannot declare an attack. If there is no face-up Field Spell on the field, destroy this card.
